title: Nippon Paint Store is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nippon Paint Store is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Nippon Paint Store are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nippon Paint Store:
Nippon Paint Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nippon Paint Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
